author: hrngo
title: Skip song problem
content:
Thanks for the great FLAC player app. However I would like to feedback a problem that I could not skip a song (perform next song action) while playing songs from Apple Files (On My iPhone) and my iPhone is being in lock screen mode. I skip about 3 songs then the app stop playing. My iphone is using iOS 14.6

Hopefully the app dev team can fix this problem soon. Thank you again!
